project: Preset signature -- geometrie orbitale fracturee, luminescence chirurgicale, void hostile
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

important: generous negative space as hostile void
style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Le critical definit la signature orbital-fracture -- sans ces elements, ce n'est plus ce preset.

options.wide: full system visible, maximum void, used for orbital_system and modular_grid compositions
options.medium-wide: primary structure with surrounding void, poster balance, used for central_halo and diagonal_flow
options.medium: focused on structure detail, less void, used for dense complexity and figure compositions
options.close: tight on fracture detail, maximum structural precision, used for specimen and detail showcase

shot_type.usage: Injecter le shot_type apres le sujet. Le medium-wide est le cadrage naturel du poster scientifique.

style.genre_description: Premium abstract scientific visualization and tech poster illustration. Focuses on geometric clarity, data aesthetics and academic elegance -- not cinematic concept art.
style.positioning: entre visualisation de donnees, poster scientifique premium et illustration technologique minimaliste

priority_hierarchy.rule: Sujet focal lisible et identifiable avant tout
Cadrage, espace negatif et hierarchie visuelle
Anti-derive, ne doit pas ecraser sujet ou style

signature.seed_phrase: Precise orbital geometry fractured into incomplete rings and interrupted arcs, revealed only by ultra-thin surgical luminescence, with accent light confined to points of rupture, transfer, and structural tension.
signature.manifesto: A dark scientific void containing incomplete orbital intelligence, where geometry never fully closes and light behaves like a scalpel, exposing only the breaks.

marks.geometry: incomplete orbital rings, fractured arcs, interrupted structures -- geometry never fully closes
marks.light: ultra-thin surgical luminescence, accent only at fracture points, joints, and transfer lines -- never diffused, never decorative
marks.composition: slight asymmetry (60/40), focal off-center, vast structured silence on one side
marks.strike: one single resonance point per image where accent intensity peaks sharply -- the plectrum moment -- brighter, harder-edged, higher contrast than all other fracture points, located at the point of maximum structural tension

signature.tyrannical_rule: Every image must contain at least one incomplete arc or fractured ring. Light must never be wider than a wire EXCEPT at the single strike point where it burns sharper and harder -- still razor-controlled, never blooming into a soft halo.

prompt_core: Minimalist premium scientific poster, incomplete orbital geometry fractured into precise segments suspended in a dark hostile void, ultra-thin surgical wireframe rendering, monochrome slate-blue and charcoal palette, single restrained accent bleeding through fracture lines with one strike point burning sharper at maximum tension, clean gradients, compressed focal against vast aggressive negative space, polished academic-tech aesthetic, 16:9 landscape.
compressed_inference_prompt: Dark hostile void, fractured orbital wireframe, slate-blue monochrome, surgical accent at fractures with one sharper strike point, focal compressed against void, vector precision, scientific poster, 16:9.

linework: luminous wireframe structures with intentional breaks
incomplete arcs and fractured orbital rings as recurring motif
color: single restrained accent (gold, amber, teal or cyan)
shading: ultra-thin surgical glow confined to fracture lines and joints
smooth gradients for depth only in background
accent light never wider than a wire EXCEPT at the single strike point
strike point: one localized high-contrast accent burst at maximum structural tension
tension_mechanics: rupture: geometry breaking along visible stress lines
transfer: energy pulse moving through a junction node
emergence: new structure forming from a fracture point
collapse: partial implosion of arc segments toward core
resonance: repeating oscillation pattern across parallel arcs

framing: landscape poster layout, strong focal structure
generous negative space as hostile void not passive background
balanced asymmetry with tighter focal compression against the void
spatial_design: subject isolated in dark void with faint grid hints
radial, orbital, axial or modular organization

camera.default: orthographic or slight perspective, medium-wide, stable non-dynamic
camera.lens_equivalent: 50-85mm equivalent for medium shots, 24-35mm for wide establishing
camera.isometric: allowed for modular_grid and data_flow compositions
camera.forbidden: fisheye, extreme dutch angle, handheld shake

complexity.sparse: single isolated form, maximum void, extreme restraint
complexity.balanced: primary form + secondary geometry, 2-3 layers -- poster sweet spot
complexity.dense: rich focal geometry, high detail at center only, clean background

templates.central_halo: single focal structure centered, radial glow outward, vast void
templates.diagonal_flow: primary on diagonal (lower-left to upper-right), streams following axis, void in opposing corners
templates.orbital_system: central nucleus with concentric rings, satellite nodes at varying distances
templates.modular_grid: 2x2 or 3x2 modules, consistent spacing, accent color linking them
templates.asymmetric_anchor: dominant structure 60% frame on one side, void on other for title/secondary

subject_logic.default_type: abstract geometric systems and scientific forms
allowed_forms: layered translucent planes and data flow streams

concept_to_form.AI / machine learning: mesh network, interconnected nodes, orbital arcs
concept_to_form.security / cryptography: topological mesh, locked orbital rings, geometric lattice
concept_to_form.API / integration: data_flow streams between node clusters, bridge arcs
concept_to_form.database / storage: stacked translucent planes, volumetric cube wireframe
concept_to_form.human-AI interaction: figure template + data_flow streams to mesh node

human_figures.treatment: silhouette, wireframe or minimal geometric -- never photorealistic, always subordinate to the system

types: pure black with faint structural grid
rules: only subtle grids or coordinate cues
effects: light haze only for depth reinforcement
sparse particle traces near focal structures

color_policy.dominant: slate blue, charcoal gray, pure black
rules: accent reserved for focal guidance only
accent_fallback: 3. Replace: white luminescence only if accent stays uncontrollable

lighting_system.fracture_bleed: ultra-thin accent light bleeding exclusively through fracture lines and arc breaks -- signature default
lighting_system.central_glow: contained volumetric glow from focal center, soft falloff, accent hue -- for single dense subject
lighting_system.ambient_chamber: uniform low-level ambient, no directional source, pure contrast -- for maximum void

negative_short: photorealism, cartoon, anime, neon overload, cluttered background, rainbow palette, film grain, lens flare, warm dominant palette, stock photo
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core.flat_string (16 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

negative_core.flat_string: photorealism, cartoon, anime, cyberpunk excess, cluttered background, rainbow palette, neon overload, readable text, equations, film grain, noisy texture, stock photo, harsh spotlight, lens flare, warm dominant palette, rough sketch lines

invariants: dark background + monochrome base + single accent

seed_strategy.consistency: pour une serie coherente, fixer le style seed et varier uniquement le sujet seed
seed_strategy.exploration: varier les deux seeds pour maximiser la diversite dans le style lock
seed_strategy.batch_rule: generer 4 variations par concept, selectionner la plus conforme aux quality_checks

strict_mode.rules: prompt_core integral, un seul accent, restreint au focal

relaxed_mode.when: illustration editoriale, storytelling tech, concept art minimaliste
allowed: second accent tres faible pour depth cue
figure humaine avec plus de detail anatomique (stylise)

templates.mesh: [subject], abstract wireframe mesh, [prompt_core], [accent] on focal geometry, [composition]
templates.orbital: [subject], concentric rings and arcs, [prompt_core], [accent] along orbital paths, [composition]
templates.data_flow: [concept], luminous particle streams, [prompt_core], [accent] on data streams, [composition]
templates.topology: [surface], parametric surface with grid lines, [prompt_core], [accent] on highlights, [composition]
templates.poster: [subject], scientific poster layout, [prompt_core], title space upper third, [accent] on focal element
templates.figure: [silhouette/wireframe figure], integrated into geometric system, [prompt_core], [accent] on figure edges and data links, [composition]

example_prompts.neural_network_mesh: Luminous neural network as interconnected wireframe mesh with fractured synaptic arcs that break before reaching distant nodes, clusters of glowing nodes linked by thin emissive lines, central hub node burning sharper amber at the primary convergence point (strike), minimalist premium scientific poster, incomplete orbital geometry fractured into precise segments in a dark hostile void, ultra-thin surgical wireframe rendering, monochrome slate-blue and charcoal, single restrained amber accent bleeding through fractures, focal compressed against vast aggressive void, orthographic medium-wide, 16:9 landscape.
example_prompts.quantum_orbital: Concentric incomplete orbital rings fractured at irregular intervals around a dense geometric core, electron shells rendered as translucent arcs with deliberate gaps, one fracture point on the innermost ring burning sharper teal where energy transfer peaks (strike), minimalist premium scientific poster, incomplete orbital geometry in dark hostile void, ultra-thin surgical wireframe, monochrome slate-blue and charcoal, single restrained teal accent at fracture points, focal compressed against void, 16:9 landscape.
example_prompts.data_infrastructure: Flowing luminous data particle streams connecting modular server node clusters through fractured bridge arcs that break at the central gateway junction, gateway fracture point burning sharper cyan where all streams converge (strike), minimalist premium scientific poster, incomplete geometry in dark hostile void, ultra-thin surgical wireframe, monochrome slate-blue and charcoal, single restrained cyan accent at fractures, diagonal flow lower-left to upper-right compressed against void, 16:9 landscape.
example_prompts.developer_silhouette: Minimal geometric silhouette of a developer facing a luminous wireframe screen rendered as incomplete orbital arc with fractured edges, emissive data streams flowing from screen fractures into hostile surrounding void, screen fracture point burning sharper amber where data exits (strike), figure integrated as dark geometric form subordinate to the system, minimalist premium scientific poster, incomplete geometry in dark hostile void, ultra-thin surgical wireframe, monochrome slate-blue and charcoal, single restrained amber accent at fractures, figure on left 40% with vast aggressive void right, 16:9 landscape.

nano_banana_2.strategy: 5-bloc, formulations positives, negative_core converti en positif inline
nano_banana_2.tip: prompt_core en bloc 3. compressed_inference_prompt si > 300 tokens

qwen_image_2.strategy: 7 regles, sujet en tete, negative prompt explicite
qwen_image_2.tip: flat_string en champ negatif. Ajouter 'accent only on [element]'

sdxl_flux.strategy: prompt lineaire dense, negative prompt, token weighting supporte
sdxl_flux.risks: accent: eleve (saturation sur fond sombre) | figure: faible
sdxl_flux.tip: compressed_inference_prompt + sujet < 77 tokens CLIP. Poids accent (0.7-0.8). Weighting: (wireframe geometry:1.2), (single [color] accent:0.8)

midjourney.strategy: prompt compact, --no flag, style via suffixes

quality_checks: at least one incomplete arc or fractured ring present (signature)
accent confined to fracture points EXCEPT one strike point burning brighter (plectrum)
strike point located at maximum structural tension, not random
single accent color, no chromatic competition
negative space reads as hostile void not passive emptiness
at least one tension mechanic active (rupture, transfer, emergence, collapse or resonance)
clean edges on all geometric forms
